description: Spring Kafka listener container threading model refactoring across spring-kafka, spring-framework, and spring-boot

merge_order.description: Ensure messaging abstractions (MessageListenerContainer, SmartLifecycle) support concurrency configuration if needed
Refactor KafkaMessageListenerContainer to ConcurrentMessageListenerContainer with configurable concurrency, update @KafkaListener annotation processing
Update KafkaAutoConfiguration and KafkaProperties to expose concurrency defaults and wire ConcurrentMessageListenerContainer

breaking_changes: spring-kafka: Changing default container type from KafkaMessageListenerContainer to ConcurrentMessageListenerContainer may affect partition assignment behavior
spring-boot: New KafkaProperties.listener.concurrency default may change behavior for existing applications
